title: Quotas
subtitle: Provider balances and rate-quota allowances

empty.title: No quota checkers configured
empty.description: Configure quota checkers in your provider settings to monitor usage.

legacy.detectedPrefix: Legacy quota data detected ({{count}} rows in
legacy.description: Migrate this historical data into the new meter snapshots table to preserve it.

migration.completeWithSkipped: Migration complete — {{inserted}} rows inserted, {{skipped}} already existed.
migration.canTruncatePrefix: You can now truncate the old

truncateConfirm: Truncate quota_snapshots? This cannot be undone.

checkerCommon.leaveBlankDefaultEndpoint: Leave blank to use the default endpoint.
checkerCommon.usesProviderApiKeyAuto: Uses the provider's API key automatically. No additional configuration needed.

naga.provisioningKeyHintBefore: Required. Use a provisioning key from
naga.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to Naga's API.

openrouter.managementKeyHintBefore: Required. Use a management key from

ollama.sessionCookieHint: Required. Found in browser cookies after logging in to ollama.com. The cookie name is __Secure-session (with double underscores).

zenmux.managementKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Zenmux management API key
zenmux.managementKeyHintBefore: Required. Use a management API key from
zenmux.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to Zenmux's API.

zai.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to Z.AI's quota API.

wisdomgate.sessionPlaceholder: Paste your Wisdom Gate session cookie
wisdomgate.sessionHint: Required. Found in browser cookies after logging in to wisgate.ai.

wafer.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to Wafer.ai API.

synthetic.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to Synthetic's API.
synthetic.maxUtilizationHint: Threshold (1–100) to trigger cooldown. Default: 99. Set lower to reserve quota — e.g. 30 = provider cooled down at 30% usage, preserving 70%.

opencode-go.authCookieHintBefore: Required. Open your browser's DevTools (F12) → Application/Storage → Cookies → opencode.ai → copy the
opencode-go.authCookieHintAfter: cookie value. Treat it like a password.
opencode-go.endpointHint: Custom dashboard URL. Defaults to the standard OpenCode Go dashboard.

novita.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to Novita API.

nanogpt.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to NanoGPT's API.

moonshot.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to Moonshot API.

minimax.hertzSessionHint: Treated as a password. Used to query MiniMax balance.

minimax-coding.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to MiniMax coding plan API.

kimi-code.endpointHint: Custom endpoint URL. Defaults to Kimi's API.

kilo.orgIdHint: If provided, sends `x-kilocode-organizationid` for team balance.

antigravity.endpointHint: Override the Cloud Code endpoint. Leave blank to use the default with automatic sandbox fallback.

apertis.modeHint: Subscription mode monitors the plan quota and triggers cooldowns when exhausted. PAYG mode only tracks the prepaid balance, ignoring the subscription.
